Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand User Input Part 1 Normative Process Behavior Strict Rules Defines a strict sequence for a loan application process Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case Ordering Rules Credit Check before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Inform Applicant after Loan Decision If Approved Finalize Doc before Close If Rejected No Finalize Doc Not Allowed Skipping steps changing order finalizing doc after rejection closing case without following decision logic Part 2 Desiderata Recommended but Not Strict Timing recommendations Credit Check within 24h of application Inform Applicant within 48h of decision and optional Follow up Call before closing Violations are not serious Event Log Three cases with timestamps and activities Some have inline comments indicating violations Task Identify cases violating normative rules and explain reasons Identify cases failing desiderata conditions clarifying they are suboptimal but not severe Suggest interpretations justifications for observed behaviors aligned with constraints recommendations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case 1 Check Normative Rules Sequence matches exactly Order CC before RA Yes RA before LD Yes Inform after LD Yes Approved Finalize before Close Yes No skipping reordering contradictions Normative Violation None Check Desiderata CC within 24h of App Yes Inform within 48h of LD Yes Follow up Call not mentioned but optional Desiderata Violation None

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case 2 Check Normative Rules Order Risk Assessment happened before Credit Check Violates Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment Decision Rejected but Finalize Documentation occurred Violates If loan is rejected do not finalize documentation before closing the case Also Inform Applicant is completely missing The sequence says Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision Skipping it violates the strict sequence Normative Violations Yes Multiple Check Desiderata CC within 24h Yes Inform within 48h not applicable step missing Follow up not present

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case 3 Check Normative Rules Sequence App CC RA LD Inform Finalize Close Matches Order all correct Decision logic Approved Finalize before Close Matches No skipping reordering Normative Violation None Check Desiderata CC within 24h of App Violates desideratum Inform within 48h of LD Violates desideratum Follow up Call Missing encouraged but not strictly required Desiderata Violations Yes Timing delays plus missing follow up call All suboptimal but not severe

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Structure the Response Part 1 Normative Rule Violations Case 1 Compliant Case 2 Violates multiple strict rules list them clearly with reasons Case 3 Compliant Part 2 Desiderata Deviations Case 1 Compliant Case 2 secondary due to normative failures Case 3 Violates timing recommendations and missing follow up call clarify these are suboptimal but not severe Part 3 Interpretations Justifications Provide plausible reasons for the observed behaviors in each case aligning with constraints recommendations

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Why did they skip reorder Maybe system error rushed process or staff unfamiliarity Why finalize doc after rejection Maybe administrative oversight or template misuse Missing inform step could be a critical compliance gap needing immediate correction Case 3 Why delays Maybe high volume weekend or holiday or complex credit check requiring external bureau time Why missing follow up Resource constraints or deemed unnecessary for straightforward approval Emphasize that while suboptimal the strict sequence was preserved maintaining process integrity

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Self Correction Verification during drafting Check timestamps for Case 3 Jan 12 09 00 to Jan 14 10 00 is exactly 49 hours Correct Jan 14 12 00 to Jan 16 15 00 is exactly 51 hours Correct Normative rules for Case 2 prompt explicitly says Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment Case 2 does RA then CC Violation confirmed Prompt says Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision Case 2 skips it Violation confirmed Prompt says If loan is rejected do not finalize documentation before closing the case Case 2 does finalize doc Violation confirmed Desiderata Credit Check within 24h Inform within 48h Follow up call encouraged but not required Case 3 misses timing and follow up Correct

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Everything looks solid I will generate the response Output matches the refined draft Self Correction Note during thought I should make sure I explicitly state that Case 1 and Case 3 are normative compliant and Case 2 is not For desiderata Case 1 is compliant Case 3 has deviations Case 2 is overshadowed but technically missing the optional call I will keep it precise
